name: Lark Distilling Co. Ltd
summary: Lark Distilling Co. Ltd produces single malt whisky. The company operates through three segments: Whisky, Gin, and Other. It also offers spirits and liqueurs, and hand sanitizer gel. The company offers its products under the Nant, Lark, and Forty Spotted Gin brands. The company was formerly known as Australian Whisky Holdings Limited and changed its name to Lark Distilling Co. Ltd in May 2020. Lark Distilling Co. Ltd was founded in 1839 and is based in Hobart, Australia.
